title: Kaiser: The Greatest Footballer Never to Play Football
original_title: Kaiser: The Greatest Footballer Never to Play Football
overview: Carlos "Kaiser" Henrique Raposo was a professional footballer. But he never actually played a game. By convincing others of his abilities (with help from journalist friends) he moved from club to club, avoiding football but partying hard.
